sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
SELECT value, toInt8(value) AS int_value FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = '10.5' WHERE value = '128';
SELECT value, toInt8(toString(int_value + 20)) AS updated_value FROM (SELECT toInt8('-8') AS int_value) AS temp;
